1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px graphical grid rendering viewport with flexible panels)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Two-Column Visual Layout (Left Sidebar Tracking Panel: Nested Tree Hierarchy [Warehouse Complex -> Zones -> Aisles -> Shelves]; Main Content Workspace Canvas: Interactive Spatial Bin Matrix Grid displaying multi-tiered storage slots with color-coded capacity thresholds; Floating Overlay Context Panel: Selected Storage Bin Part Ledger Details Sheet)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Renders interactive 2D storage matrix alongside hierarchical location navigation tree panels)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (The hierarchical location tree transitions to a top drop-down select toolbar framework, maximizing the interactive map spacing)

user_progression_routes.on_load: Acquire active facility context constraints -> Verify location mapping structures -> Execute state payload fetch from WarehouseService.getWarehouseStructure()
user_progression_routes.on_bin_slot_click: Populate floating details card container with specific part numbers, actual weights, serialization codes, and movement log entries arrays matching target item references

redirection_rules.condition: If a storage location node undergoes an un-synchronized background stock adjustment mismatch pattern
redirection_rules.action: Flash an active border glow overlay context on the affected bin coordinate and flag state parameters locally as 'Desynchronized - Requesting Active Count'

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User hits elements control command action trigger 'btn_initiate_bin_transfer'
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Slide out explicit 450px vertical side pane layout framework enabling immediate manual re-allocation entry between storage spaces coordinates

molecules.composition: Combines a micro-grid interactive item block cell + coordinate text label marker (e.g., Row-A-Shelf-3-Slot-12) + localized material usage metrics indicator layer lines
Combines a logistics graphic design element + occupancy scale numeric text field + percentage tracking metric gauge bar component

organisms.composition: Two-dimensional dynamic rendering block looping across grid structures parameters rows, creating selectable layout coordinate points mapped explicitly to internal spatial identifiers collections.

Collapsible side information container assembling complete localized inventory states: material tracking tables fields, physical volume weight metrics, and transactional stock transfer execution toolbars.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, system-ui, sans-serif (Monospaced alignment rules parameters applied across grid address titles to preserve interface density balances)

color_palette_hex.background_canvas_base: #0B0F19 (Deep Obsidian Enterprise Tech Dark Mode Base Layout Grid Frame)
color_palette_hex.surface_panels_elevated: #1E293B (Slate Matrix Boundary Panel Grid Container Framework)
color_palette_hex.bin_occupancy_normal: #312E81 (Deep Indigo Optimal Density Storage Slot Accent Tone)
color_palette_hex.bin_occupancy_critical: #B45309 (Amber Gold Maximum Threshold Space Alert Status Accent)
color_palette_hex.bin_selection_glint: #3B82F6 (Corporate Royal Blue Interactive Layout Focus Boundary Outline)

spacing_and_borders.standard_padding_unit: 1rem (16px component box outer margins structure layout parameters grids)
spacing_and_borders.matrix_grid_cell_gap: 0.25rem (4px tight horizontal visual partitions isolating storage rows slots)
spacing_and_borders.border_radius_tokens: 0.1875rem (3px micro corner radiuses to reinforce block warehouse visual representations)

micro_interactions.style_mutation: outline modification maps border line to 2px solid #3B82F6 using an immediate 80ms execution curves duration window parameters
box-shadow properties trigger a glowing neon halo effect using context color value #3B82F6 continuously

accessibility_aria_roles.interactive_warehouse_aisle_matrix_viewp: role='grid' utilizing internal row designations mapping matrix points directly to specific cell layout elements
accessibility_aria_roles.bin_inventory_details_drawer_canvas: role='region' accompanied by explicit descriptive aria-label contexts monitoring live storage capacity adjustments updates parameters

stored_materials_summary_lines.part_name: Hardened Grade-A Carbon Steel Base Plate 12x12

local_reactive_state_variables.active_selected_bin_coordinate_id: Tracks currently focused grid mapping lookup string key used to feed data structures into details panel layers templates (string | null default pointer value)
local_reactive_state_variables.is_stock_transfer_drawer_visible: Boolean state parameters value toggling visual rendering layers for the re-allocation inventory input drawers layout interfaces
local_reactive_state_variables.spatial_grid_occupancy_threshold_filter: Numeric filter boundary parameter modulating visible cell status variations based on capacity brackets parameters settings (default null tracks all states)

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared application session multi-tenant company context parameter regulating database filtering domains cross modules scopes setups
global_application_context_bindings.asynchronous_inventory_service_sync_brok: Websocket allocation handler stream monitoring background stock transfers updates emitted directly from transport execution workflows

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 document constructs built over generic Tailwind CSS layout definitions parsing styling parameters, managing map matrices processing code natively inside client-side modern ES6 loop modules without third-party canvas or heavy layout graphing plugins libraries requirements
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Redrawing 500-cell coordinate block layouts adjustments variations following zone changing switch triggers must achieve processing updates under an execution threshold boundary target limit of 15ms

element_interaction_links.target_mutation_action: Map fetched array contents records maps directly inside localized dashboard storage cache variables, then flip active state parameter values for active_selected_bin_coordinate_id to populate sidebar frames
Mutate local state variable flag configuration is_stock_transfer_drawer_visible parameter to true to display re-allocation control sheets layers viewport modules immediately

Dispatch execution transaction data packet array blocks; overwrite old grid coordinates fields values indexes within warehouse_spatial_layout_matrix local cache structures; switch off inventory re-allocation sheet panel flags triggers variables
